reasoning: The control 3.3.2 requires that actions of individual system users be uniquely traceable to hold them accountable. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through audit logging, which records actions taken by users and system components. Ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary metadata is crucial. Additionally, RBAC configurations should be audited to ensure that user actions can be traced back to specific users or service accounts.
title: 3_3_2: 3.3.2 Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced to those users, so they can be held accountable for their actions
